svg.title: The Accountability Gap in Autonomous Agents — Pulse
svg.desc: A two-pane causal diagram. Left pane shows what happens when an autonomous agent drifts mid-decision without protocol-level enforcement: capital is lost. Right pane shows the Pulse flow: sealed TEE reasoning, on-chain commit, Uniswap v4 hook gating, and ERC-8004 reputation slashing.

g.text: The Accountability Gap in Autonomous Agents
Reasoning is the attack surface. Audits never see it.
contract executes exactly what it's told
Liquidated in 3 minutes. The audit was clean.
no cryptographic binding · no slashing · no protocol enforcement
↳ this is the agent economy in 2026, with no accountability layer
KelpDAO + Aave, April 2026: $292M lost — code was fine, off-chain decision was the gap
Reasoning is committed before action. Mismatch reverts.
→ revert before any state change · -1000 rep
Eth Sepolia · 56/56 forge tests · agent #3906 borrowing through the gate today
First primitive that makes agent decisions non-repudiable at both the contract layer AND the AMM layer.
